title: parahancornia oblonga
intro: Parahancornia oblonga, also known as the "Heart-leaved Parahancornia," is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Parahancornia oblonga include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it has been traditionally used by indigenous communities in herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions.
